summary: Complete testing of ScadenziarioPage Invoicex-style table restyling. All 9 backend pytest tests passed. Frontend UI verified: (1) Summary bar with Da Pagare/Da Incassare/Scaduti/Acquisti Anno KPIs, (2) Filter section with Fornitori/Clienti toggle, date range filters, fornitore search, solo da pagare checkbox, (3) Invoicex-style table with sortable columns (Data Scad., Pagata, Importo, Da Pagare, Documento, Data Doc., Pagamento, Fornitore, Stato), (4) Footer with Totale/Già Pagate/Da Pagare totals, (5) Amber/warm colors for overdue items, (6) Segna Pagato button triggers payment and updates UI.

summary_bar_kpis.feature: Summary bar with Da Pagare, Da Incassare, Scaduti, Acquisti Anno
summary_bar_kpis.details: All 4 KPIs visible in summary bar with correct formatting

filter_toggle_fornitori_clienti.details: Toggle switches between Fornitori and Clienti views. Label changes to Cliente in Clienti view.

date_range_filters.details: Date inputs filter scadenze by data_scadenza range

fornitore_search_filter.details: Text search filters by fornitore name in sottotitolo and titolo

solo_da_pagare_checkbox.details: Checkbox excludes items with 0 amount when checked

table_sortable_columns.feature: Sortable table columns (Data Scad., Importo, Fornitore)
table_sortable_columns.details: Clicking column headers toggles sort direction. ChevronUp/Down icons show sort state.

table_columns_invoicex_style.details: Slate-700 bg header with white text. All expected columns present.

overdue_rows_amber_bg.details: Rows with stato='scaduto' use bg-red-50/60 (very light pink/amber). Text uses amber-700 for readability instead of hard red.

footer_totals.details: Footer shows Totale, Già Pagate (always 0 currently), Da Pagare with amber styling

segna_pagato_button.feature: Segna Pagato button on payment items
segna_pagato_button.details: Check icon button triggers POST /api/fatture-ricevute/{id}/pagamenti. Toast shows 'Pagamento registrato'. Item removed from list after payment.

backend_data_documento_field.feature: Backend returns data_documento in scadenze items
backend_data_documento_field.details: Dashboard endpoint includes data_documento from fattura for display in Data Doc. column

backend_pagamento_field.feature: Backend returns pagamento in scadenze items
backend_pagamento_field.details: Dashboard endpoint includes pagamento (from condizioni_pagamento) for display in Pagamento column

clienti_view_incasso_items.details: Switching to Clienti view filters to tipo='incasso' from invoices scadenze_pagamento

test_credentials: Created and cleaned up test_session_114_*, test_invoicex_114_* users/sessions
seed_data_creation: Test fatture_ricevute and invoices created during tests, all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: ScadenziarioPage Invoicex-style table restyling complete. Key components: (1) ScadenziarioPage.js uses DashboardLayout with summary bar KPIs at top, filter section with toggles/date/search, and Invoicex-style table, (2) Backend endpoint GET /api/fatture-ricevute/scadenziario/dashboard returns scadenze array with new fields: data_documento, pagamento, (3) Table headers use slate-700 bg, overdue rows use bg-red-50/60, (4) Footer totals show Totale/Già Pagate/Da Pagare, (5) Segna Pagato button calls POST /{id}/pagamenti API, (6) Sort state managed by sortBy/sortDir, filters by vista/dataScadDal/dataScadAl/searchFornitore/soloDaPagare.
